title: Enphase Energy Stock Downgraded as Revenue Estimates Cut for 2025
text: Enphase Energy faced analyst downgrades with revenue and EBITDA estimates cut for 2025 amid weaker-than-expected Q1 results and tariff headwinds. Company missed Q1 2025 revenue target as demand softened from newly announced tariffs on Chinese-sourced products. Tariffs expected to impact gross margins approximately 2% in Q2 escalating to 6-8% by Q3 2025. Management decided to absorb most tariff expenses rather than fully passing to customers. Strategy includes sourcing battery cells from outside China by Q2 2026 to mitigate long-term impacts. Year-over-year sales fell 21% and non-GAAP EPS dropped 31% in Q1 2025. Forward guidance reflective of challenging near-term environment with sequential revenue decline from Q4 2024 levels.
